ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library branch */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library branch */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item for checkout (e.g., Book, Audiobook) */,
  "total_checkouts" INTEGER /* Total number of checkouts for the specific item type */,
  "adult_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for adults */,
  "ya_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for young adults */,
  "child_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for children */,
  "other_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for other demographics */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the library */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the library is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the library is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the library location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate for the library */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate for the library */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the library */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the library */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the library */,
  "item_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the item (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction, Biography) */,
  "item_format" TEXT /* Format of the item (e.g., Physical, Digital) */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the library */,
  "closed_days" TEXT /* Days the library is closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id", "item_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkout_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkout statistic record */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated library branch */,
  "checkout_date" TEXT /* Date of the checkout statistics record */,
  "total_checkouts" INTEGER /* Total checkouts recorded for the date */,
  "adult_checkouts" INTEGER /* Adult checkouts recorded for the date */,
  "ya_checkouts" INTEGER /* Young adult checkouts recorded for the date */,
  "child_checkouts" INTEGER /* Child checkouts recorded for the date */,
  "other_checkouts" INTEGER /* Other demographic checkouts recorded for the date */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item for checkout (e.g., Book, Audiobook) */,
  "item_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the item (e.g., Fiction, Non-Fiction, Biography) */,
  "digital_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of digital checkouts for the date */,
  "senior_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for senior citizens */,
  "student_checkouts" INTEGER /* Number of checkouts for students */,
  "program_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at library programs */,
  "service_utilization" INTEGER /* Number of services utilized (e.g., study rooms, computers) */,
  "user_satisfaction" INTEGER /* User satisfaction score (out of 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkout_statistics_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)
